name: Styrbjorn
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wears lower-class clothing: a collared shirt, breeches, and rough leather shoes.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: deadly, stealthy, devoted, hostile, vengeful
Role: Styrbjorn is a Mythic Dawn assassin who hangs out at The All-Saints Inn in the Imperial City's Temple District. He appears with orders to find and kill those who have interfered with the Mythic Dawn's plans.
Home Location Information: The All-Saints Inn in the Imperial City's Temple District.
His Mission: Styrbjorn appears alongside Marguerite Diel with orders to hunt down and kill enemies of the Mythic Dawn. He vanishes when the Oblivion Crisis is resolved.
His Abilities: Styrbjorn can cast the standard Mythic Dawn Armor and Mace spell, summoning equipment for combat.
Personality - The Silent Assassin: Styrbjorn is a devoted member of the Mythic Dawn, willing to hunt and kill enemies of the cult. He operates stealthily, blending in at the inn while waiting to strike.
author: Bethesda
